title: Italian-Style Baked Red Snapper
description: A classic Italian-inspired dish featuring a flavorful red snapper, topped with a crunchy breadcrumb mixture.
instructions: Season the snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
Dredge the snapper in flour, shaking off excess.
Place the snapper on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a bowl, toss the torn bread pieces with a little olive oil.
Sprinkle the bread mixture evenly over the snapper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the bread is golden brown.
Serve immediately, garnished with parsley if desired.
